'''Uday''' was a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Imperial Intelligence analysist|analysist]] who analyzed the recordings of the [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|Clawcraft]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
